overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural medieval village at night. The character travels along moonlit dirt paths, crosses a stone bridge with a wooden watchtower, passes a white horse, and continues over wooden planks. The scene features overcast night skies with visible moon and traditional wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path near merchant camp approaching stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward stone bridge, passing a canvas merchant tent on the left

entered.detail: large canvas tent with open front, likely a merchant stall
unpaved dirt road with grass edges winding through rural area
wooden directional sign on post beside the path
stone bridge with railings crossing water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit dirt path in a rural medieval setting. Geralt walks forward past a canvas merchant tent on the left, heading toward a stone bridge visible in the distance. The environment features grassy verges and wooden fencing with overcast night skies above.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing with wooden watchtower structure

events.description: character steps onto stone bridge crossing water, entering more enclosed space

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge with a large wooden watchtower structure on the right side

entered.detail: low stone wall railing along the left side of the bridge
tall wooden guard tower with stairs and platform extending over the water
dark water visible beneath and beside the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a stone bridge over water, passing a prominent wooden watchtower on the right. The environment becomes more enclosed with stone railings visible on the left and dark water below. The moonlight filters through the structure creating dramatic shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with stone walls approaching farm buildings

events.description: exits stone bridge and returns to open dirt path with stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking along dirt path bordered by low stone walls, approaching a saddled white horse standing ahead on the path

notable_agents.action: white horse standing still on the path ahead, equipped with saddle and bags

entered.detail: low stacked stone wall running alongside the right side of the path
traditional wooden house with thatched roof visible in the distance
wooden plank crossing visible in the far distance beyond the horse

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge, the scene opens into a wider rural area with stone walls lining the path. A white horse stands in the distance blocking the path ahead. Traditional wooden farmhouses are visible in the background under the moonlit cloudy sky.

events.description: character passes white horse and steps onto wooden plank bridge

agents.ego_description: passing the white horse on the right and crossing wooden planks over water

notable_agents.action: white horse standing still as character passes by on the left

entered.detail: dark water visible beneath the wooden plank crossing

segments.scene_description: The character passes the white horse and immediately crosses a short wooden plank bridge over water. The ground changes from dirt to wooden planks, creating a more enclosed feeling as the character continues forward off the bridge and back onto dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit medieval village, transitioning from an open dirt path to a structured bridge and back into a rural settlement. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path past a canvas merchant tent and wooden fencing under an overcast night sky. As the path leads forward, the scene shifts onto a stone bridge where the camera passes a tall wooden watchtower and dark water beneath stone railings. The environment then opens into a wider area lined with stone walls and traditional wooden farmhouses, momentarily slowing as a white horse stands in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character past the horse and across a short wooden plank bridge before returning to the dirt path.
